content.body: is anyone coming to the amsterdam meeting from/through japan? there's a brand of face masks i like that is only sold there 👀

Hello 🌞
Because of some changes to a few participants' plans, **we have 3 extra places in the meeting room**. If you’d like to join, please fill out the registration form and ping me via DM or email.
Thanks.
